zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De Mohun於1248年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親Reginald II de Mohun43歲，母親Isabel de Ferrers25歲。她於1270年與Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年11月26日在她的家鄉享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De Mohun于1248年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲Reginald II de Mohun43岁，母亲Isabel de Ferrers25岁。她于1270年与Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年11月26日在她的家乡享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De Mohun was born in 1248, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Reginald II de Mohun, was 43 and her mother, Isabel de Ferrers, was 25. She married Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt in 1270, in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 November 1280, in her hometown, at the age of 32, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De Mohun est née en 1248, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald II de Mohun, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ferrers, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt en 1270, à Branston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De Mohun 1248 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald II de Mohun 43 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Ferrers 25. Sie hat 1270 in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. November 1280 im Alter von 32 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Mohun è nata il nel 1248 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Reginald II de Mohun, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Ferrers, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt nel 1270, nel Branston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Axminster, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De Mohunが1248年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Reginald II de Mohunは43歳，母Isabel de Ferrersは25歳であった。1270年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランストンでSir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年11月26日に故郷で32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De Mohun(이)가 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald II de Mohun(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Ferrers(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브랜스턴에서 Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 11월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Mohun nasceu em 1248, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald II de Mohun, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Ferrers, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt em 1270, em Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De Mohun родилась в 1248 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reginald II de Mohun было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Ferrers, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt в 1270 г. в местности бранстон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 ноября 1280 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel De Mohun nació en 1248, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald II de Mohun, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Isabel de Ferrers, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt en 1270, en Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
